_comment: ADK eval test case — English Grade 6 PH. Run with: adk eval evals/english_grade6_ph.json

curriculum.competency_description: Identify the author's purpose for writing a text.

instructional_design.core_concept: Authors write with a specific purpose — to entertain, inform, or persuade — and recognising this purpose helps readers understand and evaluate texts more critically.
bloom_targets: Remember the three main author purposes (entertain, inform, persuade)
Understand how language and tone signal an author's purpose
Apply purpose identification to an unseen passage
instructional_design.essential_question_seed: Why does it matter why an author wrote something?

assertions.description: All 17 sections must be present in the output
All required section keys must exist in session state

assertions.name: vocab_presence
assertions.description: All vocabulary words from blueprint must appear in body sections

assertions.name: self_assess_targets
assertions.description: Self-assessment skills must match learning targets verbatim

assertions.name: answer_key_quotes
assertions.description: Answer key possible answers must quote verbatim from assessment passage

assertions.name: passage_domain_diff
assertions.description: Assessment passage topic domain must differ from model passage topic domain
PDF output must be present and non-empty
Web preview sections must be present
GenerateResponse must match the documented schema
